title: قانون رقم (65) لسنة 2006 بتعديل المادة (246) من قانون العقوبات الصادر بالمرسوم بقانون رقم (15) لسنة 1976
title_en: Law No. (59) of 2006 Amending Certain Provisions of the Law Regulating Pensions and Retirement Gratuities for Officers and Personnel of the Bahrain Defence Force and Public Security, promulgated by Legislative Decree No. (11) of 1976
